title: Brighter
description: A Minecraft mod that lets you toggle full bright inside minecraft
body:
# Brighter

Brighter is a lightweight client-side mod that allows you to toggle and adjust brightness in Minecraft beyond the default limits. It is designed for players who want greater control over visibility without relying on shaders or resource packs.

---

## Features
- Toggle Fullbright with a keybind  
- Increase brightness with the **Arrow Up** key  
- Decrease brightness with the **Arrow Down** key  
- Adjustable brightness up to **1000%**  
- Client-side only, works on any server  

---

## Usage
1. Configure the keybind in Minecraft’s controls menu to toggle Fullbright on or off.  
2. Press **Arrow Up** to gradually increase brightness.  
3. Press **Arrow Down** to reduce brightness back to normal levels.  


---
